Ad Text:
About Us

Future Secure AI is a rapidly scaling frontier‑AI company co‑developed with one of the world’s largest financial institutions. We operate with startup speed and enterprise backing, building agentic AI Co‑workers—autonomous, reasoning‑capable systems designed to partner with humans and 10x organisational performance.

With deep C‑suite access and a growing international partner network, our mission is bold and simple:
Create AI Co-workers that think, act, and collaborate—redefining how work gets done.

We are expanding fast and seeking exceptional people to help build the future of autonomous AI.

The Opportunity

As a Staff Data Scientist, you will be a senior technical leader driving the development of agentic AI Co‑workers, multi‑step reasoning systems, and enterprise‑ready autonomous workflows. You will architect and deploy advanced LLM‑driven agents that plan, decide, and take action—safely, reliably, and at scale.

You’ll shape the technical direction of our agentic AI platform, mentor emerging talent, and ensure our systems are robust, aligned, and capable of delivering high‑value outcomes in complex environments.

Your work will directly influence the evolution of how humans collaborate with AI.

What You’ll Do

Design, build, and deploy agentic LLM‑driven systems with planning, tool‑use, workflow orchestration, and reasoning capabilities

Apply machine learning and advanced analytics to power decision‑making within autonomous AI Co‑workers

Enhance multi‑step reasoning quality, context management, and agent performance across real enterprise use cases

Lead MLOps initiatives across evaluation, benchmarking, safety, and quality for autonomous systems

Define long‑term strategy for agentic AI frameworks, governance, and scalable deployment patterns

Collaborate with engineering, product, and executive teams to build production‑grade AI co-workers used by global clients

Mentor and uplift junior data scientists, raising the bar for scientific and engineering excellence

About You

You are an experienced Data Scientist with a strong record of delivering impactful ML systems and deep curiosity about the fast‑moving agentic AI and LLM ecosystem. You thrive in ambiguity, communicate clearly, and take a pragmatic approach to building real, production‑ready intelligence.

You bring:

A Master’s or PhD in a quantitative discipline

Proven delivery of high‑impact machine learning solutions in complex environments

Strong NLP foundations: transformers, LSTMs, CNNs, topic modelling, supervised NLP

Hands‑on experience with LLM orchestration frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex), RAG, multi‑agent systems, or tool‑calling architectures

Python focused on ML/AI and other languages

Experience in software development is highly desired

Ability to explain complex ideas clearly and influence cross‑functional stakeholders

Curiosity, humility, and a strong sense of ownership

Comfort operating in a high‑velocity, evolving environment

Ability to attend our Sydney CBD office 1–2 days per week

Why Join Us?

Build real agentic AI Co‑workers used daily by global enterprises across a range of industries

Work at the frontier of LLMs, reasoning systems, and autonomous workflows

Learn and grow alongside world‑class engineers, researchers, and commercial leaders

Solve hard, meaningful problems with massive real‑world impact

Join a high‑trust, high‑performance culture focused on mastery, ownership, and impact
